hero.title: Alexandre Jaques
hero.subtitle: Building scalable solutions with JavaScript, React, and Next.js. Combining 6+ years of Operations leadership with full-stack development and AI engineering.

about.title: About
paragraphs: Full-Stack Developer based in Lisbon, Portugal, with a unique background combining 6+ years of Operations leadership at a SaaS startup with hands-on software engineering.
I specialize in JavaScript, React, and Next.js, with deep experience in AI coding, RESTful APIs integration, and workflow automation using n8n/Make and Python scripting.
Currently studying AI & Machine Learning Engineering, focused on leveraging technical expertise and strategic planning to drive innovation and scalable solutions.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: My professional journey across startups and automation.

integraninja.description: Founded and led IntegraNinja, a service company specialized in building automation solutions and API integrations for clients across multiple industries.
highlights: Designed, implemented, and maintained automation workflows, custom integrations, and lightweight applications
Delivered automation projects for clients in legal, retail, healthcare, real estate, and professional services
Built flexible, scalable solutions using n8n, Make, Next.js, and Python microservices
Reduced operational costs and manual workload through data synchronization and workflow automation
Consulting: mapping processes, identifying bottlenecks, and designing automation strategies

director.description: Strategic leadership driving digital transformation and operational excellence across the organization.

headOps.description: Led cross-functional teams in process optimization, AI integration, and scaling operations for the SaaS platform.
highlights: Managed CS, Support, and Operations teams through rapid company growth
Implemented automation workflows that reduced manual processes by 60%+
Led integration of AI tools into internal operations and customer-facing products

managerCS.description: Built and managed the Customer Success team, establishing processes for onboarding, retention, and expansion.

analystCS.description: First CS hire. Handled customer onboarding, support, and success workflows from the ground up.
